name: Calculator
description: Perform arithmetic, algebra, unit conversions, and statistical computations directly inside Claude.
longDescription:
The Calculator plugin extends Claude with a powerful computation engine. It can evaluate arithmetic expressions, solve algebraic equations, convert between units, and compute statistical summaries. All calculations are performed with high precision and the plugin returns both the result and a step-by-step explanation.

**Features:**
- Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %, ** (power)
- Trigonometry: sin, cos, tan and inverses
- Unit conversions: length, mass, temperature, volume
- Statistics: mean, median, mode, variance, std deviation
- Expression simplification

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression and return the result with optional step-by-step explanation.

expression.description: The mathematical expression to evaluate, e.g. '2 + 2', 'sqrt(16)', 'sin(45 deg)'

tools.name: convert_units
tools.description: Convert a value from one unit to another.

tools.name: statistics
tools.description: Compute descriptive statistics for a list of numbers.

name: Weather
description: Get real-time weather conditions, forecasts, and historical weather data for any location worldwide.
longDescription:
The Weather plugin gives Claude access to up-to-date meteorological data. You can ask for current conditions, multi-day forecasts, hourly breakdowns, or look up historical weather for any city or coordinates.

**Features:**
- Current conditions: temperature, humidity, wind, visibility
- 7-day forecasts with high/low temperatures
- Hourly breakdown for the next 48 hours
- Historical weather by date range
- Severe weather alerts
- Air quality index (AQI)

Powered by a public weather API—no API key required for basic usage.

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Get current weather conditions for a location.

location.description: City name, postal code, or 'lat,lon' coordinates

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get a multi-day weather forecast for a location.

tools.name: get_alerts
tools.description: Get active severe weather alerts for a location.

name: Text Utilities
description: A Swiss-army knife of text processing: word count, readability scores, format conversion, slug generation, and more.
longDescription:
Text Utilities equips Claude with a comprehensive set of text-processing tools that are tedious to do manually.

**Features:**
- Word / character / sentence / paragraph counts
- Readability scores (Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog)
- Case transformations: camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, SCREAMING_SNAKE, kebab-case
- Slug generation for URLs
- Markdown ↔ plain text conversion
- JSON / YAML prettifier and minifier
- Lorem ipsum generator
- Text diff (line-by-line comparison)

tools.name: word_count
tools.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in text.

tools.name: transform_case
tools.description: Convert text to a specific case format.

tools.name: readability_score
tools.description: Calculate readability metrics for the given text.

tools.name: format_json
tools.description: Pretty-print or minify a JSON string.

minify.description: If true, minify instead of pretty-printing

name: Web Search
description: Search the web and retrieve live content from URLs so Claude can answer questions about current events.
longDescription:
The Web Search plugin lets Claude fetch real-time information from the internet. It supports keyword searches, direct URL fetching, and can extract clean readable text from web pages, stripping out ads and navigation clutter.

**Features:**
- Keyword web search returning titles, snippets, and URLs
- Fetch full page content as clean Markdown
- Domain-restricted search
- News search mode (last 24h, last week)
- Safe-search filtering

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the web and return a list of results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch and return the text content of a URL as clean Markdown.

name: GitHub Tools
description: Search repositories, read files, list issues and PRs, and interact with GitHub directly from your Claude conversation.
longDescription:
GitHub Tools brings the full power of the GitHub API into your Claude conversations. You can search repositories, read source files, list and create issues, comment on pull requests, and more—all without leaving your chat.

**Features:**
- Repository search and info
- Read any file in any public (or authorized private) repository
- List, create, and comment on Issues and Pull Requests
- View commit history and diffs
- List branches, tags, releases
- Create and update Gists

Requires a GitHub Personal Access Token for write operations and private repo access.

tools.name: search_repos
tools.description: Search GitHub repositories by keyword, language, stars, etc.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from a GitHub repository.

path.description: Path to the file within the repo

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues for a GitHub repository.

name: Database Query
description: Connect Claude to PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite databases and run read-only SQL queries safely.
longDescription:
Database Query gives Claude a secure, read-only window into your relational databases. It supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite. All queries are executed in read-only mode with configurable schema restrictions to protect sensitive data.

**Features:**
- Read-only SQL query execution
- Table schema introspection
- Query result formatting (table, JSON, CSV)
- Query explain / execution plan
- Configurable schema and table allow-lists
- Connection pooling for performance

Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite databases.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL SELECT query against the configured database.

sql.description: The SELECT SQL query to execute

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all accessible tables with their column definitions.

schema.description: Schema name to list tables from
